title: The Verandah House
description: A beachside bungalow redesigned around indoor-outdoor living. Raw concrete textures meet woven rattan and hand-thrown ceramics.

title: Studio Loft 12B
description: A 650 sq.ft apartment that doubles as a creative workspace.

title: The Saffron House
description: A 14-room boutique hotel where local craftsmanship is the architecture.

title: Morph Office, Bengaluru
description: A 4,000 sq.ft tech workspace that rejects the open-plan orthodoxy.

title: Kohl Restaurant
description: A 60-cover restaurant with smoky charcoal walls and hand-hammered brass.

title: The Quiet House
description: A weekend retreat designed for stillness. Minimal objects, maximum light.
